title: space_invite: malformed expires_at silently rejects invite as expired
description: daemon/src/store.rs:1186-1195: use_space_invite_code parses expires_at trying rfc3339 then SQLite format. unwrap_or(true) means any parse failure returns expired=true, silently converting a DB corruption into an invite rejection. The code that stores expires_at (create_space_invite, migration) never sets an expires_at, so NULL is common (no expiry). But if a string is stored that matches neither format, the invite silently dies. Should log a warning when the fallback fires so operators can diagnose.
